name: HWM_TCD_EXP_DATA_TXN
description: This table contains details for Time Clock Device export data for Transactions

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_TXN_ID
columns.Comments: The time device export data transaction id

columns.Name: PER_BDG_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: PER_BDG_LAST_UPDATE_DATE

columns.Name: DATA_MODE
columns.Comments: Data collection or export mode like full , updates, specific.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Export or Collection Data Status

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_TXN_TYPE
columns.Comments: TCD_EXP_DATA_TXN_TYPE

columns.Name: TCD_PROC_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: TCD_PROC_PROFILE_ID

columns.Name: TCD_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: TCD_SOURCE_ID

columns.Name: EXPORT_BATCH_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of batches in the data export.

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_TXN_BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: The time device export data transaction batch id

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: The time device export data definition id

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_ESS_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: The time device export data process id

columns.Name: EXPORT_BEGIN_TIME
columns.Comments: The export begin date and time

columns.Name: EXPORT_END_TIME
columns.Comments: The export end date and time

columns.Name: PER_REC_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of person records in a given export transaction and batch

columns.Name: PER_BDG_REC_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of person badge records in a given export transaction and batch

columns.Name: PAY_REC_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of payroll records in a given export transaction and batch

columns.Name: SCH_REC_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of shedule records in a given export transaction and batch

columns.Name: PER_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: The latest of last update date for person records in a given export transaction

columns.Name: PAY_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: The latest of last update date for payroll records in a given export transaction

columns.Name: SCH_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: The latest of last update date for schedule records in a given export transaction

columns.Name: SCH_SHFT_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: The latest of last update date for schedule shift records in a given export transaction

columns.Name: SCH_SHFT_REC_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of schedule shift records in a given export transaction and batch

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Id

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
